summary: Iteration 35: All 5 changes verified - Backend 10/10 passed (100%), Frontend all tests passed. Staff page removed from sidebar, Audit Log conditional on POS/KDS/QR modules, smart routing for workforce-only staff, adaptive dashboard with workforce + POS widgets, floating clock button whitelist approach.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being 0 or -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

critical_code_review_comments: Login page defaults to PIN pad with toggle for Quick PIN / Password - both always visible (VERIFIED)
Sidebar correctly removes 'Staff' nav item - staff management moved to Settings → User Management tab
Reports and Audit Log nav items conditional on hasFeature('pos') || hasFeature('kds') || hasFeature('qr_ordering')
Smart routing in ProtectedRoute: workforce-only staff → /heva-ops/shifts, POS staff → /pos
AdminDashboard shows workforce widgets (Team, On Shift, Scheduled, Hours) when hasWorkforce, POS widgets when hasPOS
GET /api/attendance/dashboard-stats returns: scheduled_shifts, clocked_in_count, clocked_in_staff, total_hours_today, total_staff, shifts
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified all 5 changes: (1) Staff nav item removed from sidebar - staff management is now in Settings → User Management tab, (2) Reports/Audit Log only shown when POS/KDS/QR modules enabled (conditional in Sidebar.js lines 168-172), (3) Smart routing after login: staff with workforce-only → /heva-ops/shifts, staff with POS → /pos (Login.js navigateByRole and App.js ProtectedRoute), (4) Dashboard shows workforce widgets (Team, On Shift, Scheduled, Hours + live staff list + today's schedule) when workforce enabled AND POS widgets when POS enabled, (5) FloatingClockButton uses whitelist approach - only visible on /dashboard, /settings, /workforce/* pages. Business rest_demo_1 has all modules enabled (pos, kds, qr_ordering, workforce).

login_pin_default.evidence: Login page shows PIN pad by default with 'Quick PIN' and 'Password' toggle buttons always visible

dashboard_workforce_widgets.evidence: Dashboard shows Team (5), On Shift (0), Scheduled (0), Hours (0.1h) widgets

dashboard_pos_widgets.evidence: Dashboard shows Today's Revenue (£55.95), Orders (2), Avg Order (£27.98), Tables (3/4)

settings_user_management_tab.evidence: User Management tab works, shows staff list with Add User button

pin_login_smart_routing.evidence: PIN 1111 login routes to /pos (since POS is enabled for rest_demo_1)

dashboard_stats_api.evidence: GET /api/attendance/dashboard-stats returns workforce stats with correct fields
